summary: Strong show highlighted by a beautiful Foolish Heart, captured in a clear but slightly trebly recording.
review: Both reviewers praise the concert as very good, singling out Foolish Heart as a standout moment. The sound capture is described as excellent, though one notes a bright, somewhat shrieky character to the mix. Overall the performance and audio are enjoyable with only minor tonal quirks.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 4‑star ratings, highlighting a solid musical performance and good (if slightly bright) recording quality, leading to an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Excellent capture overall; described as trebly and a bit shrieky, indicating bright but clear sound with minor harshness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a generally successful concert without specific set‑list issues.
